title: Houses for Rent in North Ridgeville, OH
metaTitle: Houses for Rent in North Ridgeville, Ohio
metaDescription: Looking for houses for rent in North Ridgeville, Ohio? See Cleveland-area rent ranges, housing stock, and how to tell us what you're looking for.
primaryKeyword: houses for rent North Ridgeville ohio
answerBox: North Ridgeville, Ohio is a Lorain County suburb (ZIP 44039) at the west end of I-480 near State Route 10. Rents across Greater Cleveland typically run $700-$1,800 a month. North Ridgeville isn't currently in our selection, but tell us your bedroom count and budget and we'll compare nearby options.

sections.h2: Renting a house in North Ridgeville, Ohio
body: North Ridgeville sits in Lorain County, west/southwest of Cleveland, bordering North Olmsted in Cuyahoga County to the east and Avon to the north, with **ZIP code 44039** covering the city. Interstate 480 runs to its western terminus in North Ridgeville, connecting to State Route 10 (the Lorain County Freeway), which continues west toward Elyria. Housing stock is a mix of older farmhouses on larger parcels and newer single-family subdivisions built as development has extended west from the Cuyahoga County line.

**Rent Finder Cleveland works with 90+ voucher-friendly rental homes concentrated in Cleveland's east and southeast side neighborhoods, with a few additional homes in Lorain County cities including Lorain and Elyria — North Ridgeville itself is not currently part of our selection.** If your search is flexible on location, [tell us what you're looking for](/p/book-showing) — bedrooms, budget, and whether you hold a housing voucher — and we can point you to comparable options we do work with nearby.

sections.h2: What does it cost to rent in the Cleveland area?
body: North Ridgeville rents will vary by home and subdivision, but as a general Greater Cleveland benchmark, Zumper's July 4, 2026 report puts the metro's median asking rent at **$1,250/month** overall, with 2-bedroom units around **$1,100** and 3-bedroom units around **$1,350**. RentCafe's July 2, 2026 report, which weights toward larger professionally-managed buildings, shows a higher metro average of **$1,564/month**. Actual North Ridgeville house rents will depend on the specific home, its size, and condition.

North Ridgeville is served by Interstate 480, which ends at its western terminus in the city and connects to State Route 10, the main freeway running west toward Elyria and Lorain. State Route 20 (Center Ridge Road) also runs through the city as a local east-west corridor. Greater Cleveland RTA's fixed bus network does not extend this far west into Lorain County, so a car is the practical way to get around North Ridgeville and commute toward Cleveland or the rest of Lorain County.

items: **Highways:** I-480 western terminus, connecting to State Route 10
**Location:** Lorain County, bordering North Olmsted (Cuyahoga County) and Avon

sections.h2: Section 8 and voucher holders looking in North Ridgeville
body: North Ridgeville is in Lorain County rather than Cuyahoga County, so the [Cuyahoga Metropolitan Housing Authority (CMHA)](https://www.cmha.net/housing/applicants/housing_choice_vouchers.php) Housing Choice Voucher program described in our Cleveland-area guides does not directly administer vouchers here — renters in North Ridgeville should check with Lorain County's local public housing authority for the applicable voucher process. Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept Housing Choice Vouchers, so acceptance in North Ridgeville depends on the individual landlord regardless of county. Every home Rent Finder Cleveland works with, including our homes in nearby Lorain and Elyria, accepts Section 8 and is HUD-inspection-ready — see our [Section 8 guide](/section-8-housing-cleveland-oh/) for how the Cuyahoga County program works.

If your search spans both North Ridgeville and Cleveland proper, our [houses for rent in Cleveland](/houses-for-rent-cleveland-oh/) pillar page covers the neighborhoods where we work with inventory today. You can also compare nearby [Avon](/cleveland-rentals/suburbs/houses-for-rent-avon-ohio/) or [Westlake](/cleveland-rentals/suburbs/houses-for-rent-westlake-ohio/), or [tell us what you need](/p/book-showing) and we'll help you weigh it against homes we do work with.

faq.q: Does Rent Finder Cleveland works with houses in North Ridgeville, Ohio?
faq.a: Not currently. Our 90+ voucher-friendly rental homes are concentrated in Cleveland's east and southeast side neighborhoods, with a few additional homes in nearby Lorain and Elyria. If you're flexible on location, tell us your bedroom count and budget and we'll point you to comparable options we do work with.

faq.q: How much does it cost to rent a house in North Ridgeville, Ohio?
faq.a: North Ridgeville-specific pricing varies by home and subdivision, but as a Greater Cleveland benchmark, Zumper's July 2026 report shows a metro median of about $1,100 for 2-bedroom and $1,350 for 3-bedroom units, while RentCafe's July 2026 report runs higher for larger professionally-managed buildings.

faq.q: What ZIP code is North Ridgeville, Ohio in?
faq.a: North Ridgeville is ZIP code 44039, in Lorain County, bordering North Olmsted in Cuyahoga County to the east and Avon to the north.

faq.q: Does CMHA administer Section 8 vouchers in North Ridgeville?
faq.a: No. CMHA is the Cuyahoga Metropolitan Housing Authority, and North Ridgeville is in Lorain County, so a different local public housing authority handles vouchers there. Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept Housing Choice Vouchers, so acceptance depends on the individual landlord.

faq.q: How do I get from North Ridgeville to downtown Cleveland?
faq.a: Interstate 480 begins at its western terminus in North Ridgeville and connects east toward Cleveland, or State Route 10 and State Route 20 provide local east-west routes. Greater Cleveland RTA's bus network does not reach this far west, so most residents drive.
